items.explanation: perform available actions. Grouped by video, video and GPS, and GPS.
items.name: Action Buttons

items.explanation: adds a trackpoint at the  location on the map at the time specified in video
items.name: Add Trackpoint Button

items.explanation: deletes the selected trackpoints
items.name: Delete Trackpoints Button

items.explanation: controls the direction of immediate synchronization of video and trackpoints
items.name: Directional Synch Menu

items.explanation: Adjusts elevations and gradients
items.name: Elevation Button

items.explanation: shows route elevation and slope gradient. Click or ⇧-click to select trackpoints.
items.name: Elevation Chart

items.explanation: exports a synchronized GPX file
items.name: Export GPX Button

items.explanation: exports a syncrhonized .mp4 file
items.name: Export Video Button

items.explanation: displays video, map, elevation chart, trackpoint table, and document contents.
items.name: GPX-V Document Window

items.explanation: opens this tutorial.
items.name: Help Button

items.explanation: imports a GPX file
items.name: Import GPX Button

items.explanation: imports one or more .mp4 video files
items.name: Import Video Button

items.explanation: shows three classes of available information. Click the one you want to see.
items.name: Information Option Control

items.explanation: shows the document change history, checks for potential problems, and current project status.
items.name: Information View

items.explanation: shows applied speed changes, filters, and titles. Click to edit.
items.name: Interval Control

items.explanation: shows applied speed changes, filters, and titles. Click to edit.
items.name: Interval Control

items.explanation: switches between traffic and satellite views.
items.name: Map Type Control

items.explanation: deletes audio tracks
items.name: Remove Audio Button

items.explanation: interpolates a route between two selected points
items.name: Route Interpolation Button

items.explanation: displays your route.
items.name: Route Map

items.explanation: deletes selected trackpoints and video
items.name: Segment Delete Button

items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last frames of the selection.
items.name: Selected Video Frames

items.explanation: controls selected video and trackpoints. Slide, click or ⇧-click to change the selection. Use the buttons at each end to adjust the ends of the range by one second at a time.
items.name: Selection Range Slider

items.explanation: shares a frame or clip
items.name: Share Video Button

items.explanation: opens an editor to apply speed adjustments to video and GPX simultaneously.
items.name: Speed Adjustment Button

items.explanation: shows your GPX-V subscription status and lets you subscribe, upgrade, or manage your subscription.
items.name: Subscription Button

items.explanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.name: Tick Backward Button

items.explanation: moves the selection one second backward.
items.name: Tick Forward Button

items.explanation: opens an editor to add text to the video for a selected segment
items.name: Titles Button

items.explanation: Edits the selected trackpoints
items.name: Trackpoint Edit Button

items.explanation: lists the GPS trackpoints in order. Click a row to select the point, ⇧-click to select a range. Arrow keys work too.
items.name: Trackpoint Table

items.explanation: trims from the start of the video until the first selected trackpoint
items.name: Trim From Start Button

items.explanation: trims from the last selected trackpoint until the end of the video
items.name: Trim Until End Button

items.explanation: opens an editor to apply image filters to the selected video to compensate for shadows, glare, etc.
items.name: Video Filter Button

items.explanation: plays the imported and merged video files.
items.name: Video Player

items.explanation: contains the video player and selection controls.
items.name: Video Workspace

items.explanation: zooms in as close as possible on the selected trackpoint.
items.name: Zoom In Button

items.explanation: zooms out to view the entire route.
items.name: Zoom Out Button

items.explanation: adds a new title to the list.
items.name: Add Button

items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.name: Apply/Confirm Changes button

items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.name: Cancel button

items.explanation: deletes the selected title.
items.name: Delete Button

items.explanation: set the font family, style, size and color that will be applied.
items.name: Font Controls

items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the title will be applied.
items.name: Frame Preview

items.explanation: opens a window that plays a preview of the selected title.
items.name: Preview button

items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the title will be applied.
items.name: Range Label

items.explanation: selects the time range in the video to which the selected title will be applied. Slide, click or ⇧-click to change the selection. Use the buttons at each end to adjust the ends of the range by one second at a time.
items.name: Selection Range Slider

items.explanation: shows the subtitle that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.name: Subtitle

items.explanation: lists the titles you have applied to the video.
items.name: Table View

items.explanation: positions the title text in the video frame. Click to select the desired position.
items.name: Text Placement Control

items.explanation: shows the title that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.name: Title

items.explanation: inserts and formats text into segments of the video.
items.name: Title Editor

items.explanation: adds a new filter to the list.
items.name: Add Button

items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Video Filter Editor.
items.name: Apply/Confirm Changes button

items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Video Filter Editor.
items.name: Cancel button

items.explanation: adjusts the color temperature of the applied filter.
items.name: Color Temperature Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the tint of the applied filter.
items.name: Color Tint Slider

items.explanation: deletes the selected filter.
items.name: Delete Button

items.explanation: adjusts the gamma (mid-tone lift) of the applied filter.
items.name: Gamma Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the highlight protection of the applied filter.
items.name: Highlight Protection Slider

items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the filter will be applied.
items.name: Original Frame View

items.explanation: opens a window that plays a preview of the applied filter.
items.name: Preview button

items.explanation: shows the effect of the applied filter on the first, middle, and last video frames.
items.name: Preview Frame View

items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the filter will be applied.
items.name: Range Label

items.explanation: selects the time range in the video to which the selected filter will be applied. Slide, click or ⇧-click to change the selection. Use the buttons at each end to adjust the ends of the range by one second at a time.
items.name: Selection Range Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the shadow lift of the applied filter.
items.name: Shadow Lift Slider

items.explanation: lists the filters you have applied to the video.
items.name: Table View

items.explanation: defines and applies video filters to segments of the video.
items.name: Video Filter Editor

items.explanation: inserts the interpolated trackpoints into your route.
items.name: Apply Button

items.explanation: chooses between Bicycle, Automobile, Walking or Any routing using Apple Maps.
items.name: Interpolation Type Control

items.explanation: shows the existing route, the selected segment, and the expected interpolation.
items.name: Map View

items.explanation: shows the video and trackpoint time interval you have selected.
items.name: Time Range Label

items.explanation: improves the route accuracy between two waypoints.
items.name: Trackpoint Interpolation Editor

items.explanation: adds a new speed adjustment to the list.
items.name: Add Button

items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.name: Apply/Confirm Changes button

items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Speed Editor.
items.name: Cancel button

items.explanation: deletes the selected speed adjustment.
items.name: Delete Button

items.explanation: sets whether the speed will be adjusted up or down.
items.name: Direction Control

items.explanation: shows how your route changes elevation. Colors signal the gradient of the slope. Click to select a trackpoint, ⇧-click to select a range.
items.name: Elevation Chart

items.explanation: sets the factor for speed adjustment. 2x down slows 120 fps video to 60 fps video, adjusting trackpoint times to match.
items.name: Factor Control

items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.name: Frame Preview

items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the speed adjustment will be applied.
items.name: Range Label

items.explanation: raises or lowers video and trackpoint speeds for selected segments.
items.name: Speed Editor

items.explanation: lists the speed adjustments you have applied.
items.name: Table View

items.explanation: clears the project list. For DEBUG purposes.
items.name: Clear Button

items.explanation: displays all the projects you have created, across devices and volume.
items.name: GPX-V Library Window

items.explanation: displays the total number of your projects, source video storage used, and distance covered.
items.name: Library Summary

items.explanation: controls the devices from which you are displaying GPX-V projects in the Project Table.
items.name: Machine Popup

items.explanation: shows additional information as needed.
items.name: Notes Label

items.explanation: opens the selected project. You can also double-click the project in the table.
items.name: Open Button

items.explanation: displays projects and their associated data items.
items.name: Project Table

items.explanation: updates the list of projects.
items.name: Refresh Button

items.explanation: searches for projects in the folder you select.
items.name: Scan Button

items.explanation: controls the volumes from which you are displaying GPX-V projects in the Project Table.
items.name: Volume Popup

items.explanation: shows About This Mac, System Settings..., Location, App Store, Recent Items, Sleep, Restart..., Shutdown..., Lock Screen, Log Out...
items.name: Apple Menu

items.explanation: shows Undo, Redo, Cut, Copy Selected Rows, Paste
items.name: Edit Menu

items.explanation: shows New, Open…, Open Recent, Import GPX..., Import Video...
items.name: File Menu

items.explanation: shows Font, Text
items.name: Format Menu

items.explanation: shows About GPX-V, Settings..., Services, Hide GPX-V, Hide Others
items.name: GPX-V Menu

items.explanation: shows NSMenuItem, GPX-V Help, GPX-V Quick Reference, Welcome to GPX-V...
items.name: Help Menu

items.explanation: shows Welcome to GPX-V…, GPX-V Help, GPX-V Quick Reference
items.name: Help Menu

items.explanation: shows GPX, Video, Video & GPX
items.name: Tools Menu

items.explanation: shows Show Toolbar, Customize Toolbar…, Show Sidebar, Enter Full Screen
items.name: View Menu

items.explanation: shows Show Tab Bar, Show All Tabs, Show Toolbar, Customize Toolbar…, Show Sidebar
items.name: View Menu

items.explanation: shows Minimize, Minimize All, Zoom, Zoom All, Fill
items.name: Window Menu
